SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF ISAAC SAFIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KELLY FLEMING, ASSISTANT MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-11-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ISAAC SAFIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KELLY FLEMING, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT DECLINES STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFIER, ISAAC

(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: THE REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED, OTHER ORDERS THE PHRASE BEGINNING "MR SAFIER STOPPED" ON P.3 LINE 4 AND ENDING "AND" ON P.3 LINE 5 IS DELETED FROM THE 09/14/2018 MEMORANDUM. THE JUDGMENT OTHERWISE IS UNAMENDED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-31-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAFIER, ISAAC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL HOME WARRANTY COMPANY SEE MEMORANDUM FOR STATEMENT OF REASONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
